svg.title: Community dynamics
svg.desc: Grief gets mirrored. Anxiety gets reassurance. Soothing Empathy leads in the replies.

svg.text: GRIEF GETS MIRRORED. ANXIETY GETS REASSURANCE.
SOOTHING EMPATHY LEADS IN THE REPLIES.
Grief gets mirrored. Anxiety gets reassurance. Soothing Empathy leads in the replies.
